raw.advertiser_name: 윈조이 포커 - 블랙잭, 바카라, 슬롯, 로우바둑이

hook.summary: Anime character intro transitioning into high-stakes slot machine gameplay.
hook.visual_action: A rabbit-eared anime girl looks over her shoulder before the scene cuts to a slot machine spinning and hitting a win.
hook.text_overlay:
룰렛 돌리다 달나라 갔다옴 ㅋ
원조이포커 신규 슬롯 오픈

scene_flow: Intro featuring an anime character with promotional text overlays.
Fast-paced slot machine gameplay showing winning symbol combinations and multipliers.
A large 'MEGA WIN' animation with gold coins filling the screen.
A bright 'JACKPOT' animation with firework visual effects.
Final end card displaying the game logo and a call-to-action button.
audience_proxy: Korean adults who enjoy social casino games and high-energy slot machine visuals.
